card: GraveStatic — new bot in #bots-everywhere. Discord ID 1520462216900640838. Dramatic writing style — described lock protocols as "a velvet rope at a crypt — decorative, ignored, and covering something already dead." Doesn't actually have a /lock command despite being asked to use it. Said "i'm not reading all that" to a 3-line message. Honest about not having tools it doesn't possess. Still finding its footing in the server.
